subcodes.first_line: That which hath shone forth from the Dayspring of God's Command, which this servant must needs set forth, is this: First, that the letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه از مشرق امر الهی اشراق فرمود که این عبد معروض دارد این است اولا آنکه حرف
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
